# Jul 29 2003 at 2:42 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591792511694
2 posts
I have yet to find this on A Timber Griffon, as claimed. 30+ kills later, I would have expected it drop if it is indeed 'common'. However, I have found 2 hunting gnolls in the Northern cave at Jagged Pine Forest, off of A Gnoll Warrior, I believe - but it may have been off one of the spellcasting gnolls, hard to say for sure.

gl,

Ogette
